root_cause_analysis.why_watchdog_reported_40pct: The cron-watchdog likely runs the collect-prices script which uses Invoke-WebRequest. This fails for 3 out of 5 endpoints tested (OKX, Binance, CryptoCompare) due to SSL/TLS/GFW issues from the sandbox. However, these APIs actually WORK from the host PowerShell. The script's CryptoCompare strategy fails with 401 (API key required since CoinDesk acquisition).
key_findings: CryptoCompare API is BROKEN - requires API key (401 error). Must replace with CoinGecko.
Gateio WS (api.gateio.ws) works correctly. Script uses correct domain.
OKX and Binance work but may be intermittent from China.
CoinGecko is confirmed working. Add as primary fallback.
remediation: Replace CryptoCompare with CoinGecko as primary source
Keep Gateio WS as secondary source
Add OKX as third fallback source
Add Binance as fourth fallback source
Keep Bing search as last resort

macro_data_sources.yahoo_vix: Working - can be primary VIX source
macro_data_sources.tradingeconomics_oil: TBD - need to test with browser
macro_data_sources.kitco_gold: TBD - need to test with browser

recommendation: Rewrite collect-prices-simple.ps1 with CoinGecko as primary, Gateio WS as fallback1, OKX as fallback2, Binance as fallback3. Keep Bing search as last resort. Remove CryptoCompare entirely.
